Ingredients Aqua, Sorbitol, Glycerin, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Potassium Citrate, Menthol, Chlorhexidine Digluconate, Aroma, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Citric Acid, Anethole, Carvone, Eugenol, Cinnamal, Mentha Piperita Oil, Limonene, Contains Sodium Fluoride 0.05 % w/w (225 ppm F) Directions Use a capful of mouthwash after brushing teeth. Rinse thoroughly for 30 seconds, then spit out. Do not swallow.
